kibana.alert.rule.name: GOV-DET-001
user.name: contractor-test-01
kibana.alert.reason: Contractor VPN off-hours logon from NL (non-baseline country) at 02:04 IST

emulation.issue: 30-minute suppression window still active from 2025-02-01 config

kibana.alert.rule.name: GOV-DET-002

emulation.issue: 30-minute NetFlow delay; detection fires 30 min after event
